Description:

[skimage.morphology.label ](https://scikit-image.org/docs/stable/api/skimage.morphology.html#skimage.morphology.label)
Does not exist in the morphology library, as far as I can tell this method refers to  [skimage.measure.label]( https://scikit-image.org/docs/stable/api/skimage.measure.html#skimage.measure.label).
Apologies if I have misunderstood something.
Thanks,
Matt



### Way to reproduce:

Visit https://scikit-image.org/docs/stable/api/skimage.morphology.html#skimage.morphology.label
